who: HR managers in retail companies using Shopify for workforce management
offer: For HR managers in retail companies using Shopify processing 10-20 shifts/week, inaccurate labor forecasting causes understaffing, leading to poor customer service. We provide shift scheduling instead of manual scheduling and Excel spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate labor forecasting leading to understaffing or overstaffing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workforce management
DM outreach to HR managers with a demo video
Participate in community forums for HR tool sharing
try_it: Let users try shift scheduling interface and reporting dashboard
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the scheduling workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing employee data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
